channel.title: Tom Slater — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED NVDA (+20%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added NVDA in Q4 2025 · 9.4% of portfolio. AI infrastructure conviction.

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED MELI (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added MELI in Q4 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio. Building MercadoLibre.

item.title: Tom Slater: TRIMMED TSLA (-8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) trimmed TSLA in Q4 2025 · 6.8% of portfolio. Small Tesla trim — rebalancing.

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED SHOP (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added SHOP in Q4 2025 · 4.7% of portfolio. Adding Shopify.

item.title: Tom Slater: TRIMMED AMZN (-7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) trimmed AMZN (Amazon.Com) in Q4 2025 · 5.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED NFLX (+912%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added NFLX (Netflix Inc) in Q4 2025 · 2.9% of portfolio.

item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) trimmed META (Meta Platforms Inc) in Q4 2025 · 2.4% of portfolio.
